channel.title: Green Rocket Security Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Green Rocket Security Inc. (greenrocketsecurity).

item.title: CVE-2023-4951 · 2 LOW — Cross Site Scripting (XSS) Issue on "Client Based Authentication Policy Configuration" Screen
item.description: A cross site scripting issue was discovered with the pagination function on the "Client-based Authentication Policy Configuration" screen of the GreenRADIUS web admin interface. This issue is found in GreenRADIUS v5.1.1.1 and prior. A fix was include…
